name: Beam350
comment:
Beam 350 is a moving head light which is the latest development of the smart, efficient products, 
beautiful shape combined with the advanced technology of today's stage lighting products with 
international advanced electronic control technology and excellent user-friendly industrial design. 
This moving head, use ceramic luminescent film reflector as a condenser system, coupled with the 
high-quality optical lens components, broadband voltage, a clear pattern, sharp and uniform output 
light efficiency.

capabilities.comment: Gobo Rot Wheel CW F > S
Gobo Rot Wheel CCW S > F
